name: Easy Caramel Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Jonathan apples, unpeeled, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the caramel candies and flour.
2. Add the apples, caramel ice cream topping, and lemon juice; mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the pre-baked pie crust.
4. Top with pecans.
5. Bake on a preheated baking sheet at 375°F for 40-45 minutes until the crust has browned.
6. Cool.
